title: Command Top HUD Compact
summary: Compacted the Command deck's top chrome so the active lane workspace starts much higher in the first viewport while preserving the deck switcher and selected-lane rail state.

stageModel.desktopBehavior: The Command deck shortens the app shell padding, topbar, Atlas mark, snapshot pill, deck dock, and deck buttons so the workspace begins near the top of the viewport.
stageModel.mobileBehavior: The mobile topbar keeps its stacked flow, the deck dock remains horizontally scrollable, and deck subtitles stay hidden to preserve compact controls.
stageModel.motionBehavior: The existing active deck sweep remains in place, but the reduced chrome makes the animation read as a HUD indicator instead of a large navigation block.

verification: In-app browser QA on command deck Chronicle route at 1440x900 and 390x844
